changelog: **Payment banner pattern collision** — removed `"Final notice"` from pattern 1's `anyText` array in `standalone-scripts/payment-banner-hider/src/types.ts`. Pattern 1's XPath was matching pattern-2's outer wrapper and stealing the hit before pattern 2 could resolve, breaking the `banner-collapse.test.ts` "pattern 2 (inner div)" assertion.
**`audit-releases.yml`** — added `SKIP_TAGS="v3.77.1"` so the weekly audit no longer fails on the source-only `v3.77.1` tag that was superseded before assets were uploaded.
